name: magus-website-editor
description: Build-only dependencies for the committed browser bundles: the playground's CodeMirror editor (js/editor.js -> gen/playground/editor.js) and the graph explorer's d3-force view (js/graph-explorer.js -> gen/graph/explorer.js). esbuild (pinned in mise.toml) bundles each into a committed artifact, like gen/playground/buzz.wasm. Managed with pnpm (pinned in mise.toml), NOT npm: .npmrc sets minimum-release-age (10 days) so a just-published version is never installed. `pnpm run build` is the entry point; magusfile.buzz (generate) runs `pnpm install --frozen-lockfile && pnpm run build`. Not part of the site's runtime dependency graph.

scripts.build: pnpm run build-editor && pnpm run build-graph-explorer && pnpm run build-mermaid && pnpm run build-hljs
